name: access-ai
description: Root scripts to run the full local stack (Postgres + sign-inference + Node API + Vite)

scripts.dev:win: concurrently -k -n sign,api,web -c magenta,green,cyan "cd services/sign-inference && .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 9001" "pnpm --dir server dev" "pnpm --dir frontend dev"
